'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 111''' is the one hundred eleventh issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[February 11]], [[2004]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]
*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]
*[[Lumiya|Shira Brie]]
*[[Bultar Swan/Legends|Bultar Swan]]
*[[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]]
*[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]
*[[Swarm-class battle droid]]
*[[Yuuzhan Vong]] weapons
*[[Gungan battle wagon/Legends|Gungan battle wagon]]
